MANUFACTURERS AUTHORIZATION FORM
Dear Sir / Madam,
We who are established and reputable manufacturers of Desktop Computers, All in 
One PC, Micro PC / Mini PC, Thin Client / Zero Client, High-End Workstations,
Storage and Servers & Etc. PRODUCTS and having factories at Baner, Pune,
hereby confirm that we Linux Lab Technologies, are submitting a Bid, and sign the 
contract with you against the above Bid Invitation.
We hereby extend our full guarantee and warranty as per Clauses of the Terms and 
Conditions of Contract for the goods and services offered by the above firm against 
this Bid Invitation We also do confirm that the MAF will be valid till the end of
contract period of GeM bid reference No. GEM/2026/B/7319588, Dated: 05-03-2026.

--- Page 2 ---
ORIGINAL EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURER (OEM)
OEM CERTIFICATE
TO WHOMEVER IT MAY CONCERN
Dear Sir/Mam,
We, LINUX LAB TECHNOLOGIES, who are established and reputed OEM of HPC Brand of Desktop
Computers, Mini PC, All in one PC, Micro PC, Thin Clients, Zero Clients, High-End Workstation,
Storage, Servers & Monitors having factory at Swapnasphurti Business Center Office No. 9&11, 3rd
Floor, Nr. Amar Business Zone, Veerbhadra Nagar, Baner, Pune, Maharashtra 411045 do hereby
authorize M/s.Bhavesh M Nayani to submit a bid, & sign the contract with you for the goods
manufactured by usagainst Gem Bid.
No company, firm, or individual other than M/s. LINUX LAB TECHNOLOGIES is authorized to bid, and
conclude the contract about this business.
We would like to bring to your kind notice that LLT has a full fledged team who can provide the
best local implementation & after sales support and our local Engineers are trained and certified
by our team. I take the privilege to inform you that there local engineers can integrate and
program the system as per to the design requirements and can provide the best support.
We hereby extend our full guarantee and warranty as per clause of the general Conditions of
Contract and Clause of the Special Conditions of Contract for the goods and services offered by the
above firm.

Dear Sir/Mam,

1.Desktop Computers

having factory at Swapnasphurti Business Center Office No. 9&11, 3rdFloor, Nr. Amar Business Zone,
Veerbhadra Nagar, Baner, Pune, Maharashtra 411045 do here by submit a bid,&sign the contract with you
for the goods manufactured by us against Gem Bid.
No company, firm,or individual other than M/s. LINUX LAB TECHNOLOGIES is authorized to bid, and 
conclude the contract about this business.
We would like to bring to your kind notice that LLT has a full fledged team who can provide the best local 
implementation & after sales support and our local Engineers are trained and certified by our team.I take 
the privilege to inform you that there local engineers can integrate and program the system as per to the 
design requirements and can provide the best support.
We hereby extend our full guarantee and warranty as per clause of the general Conditions of Contract 
and Clause of the Special Conditions of Contract for the goods and services offered by the above firm.
NOTE - WE LINUX LAB TECHNOLOGIES is an OEM of HPC BRAND

Self-Certiﬁcation under preference to Make in India order
(Refer Clause No. 2.8 & 3.4.4 of ITT)
CERTIFICATE
In line with Government Public Procurement Order No. P-45021/2/2017-PP (BE-II) dated
04.06.2020 and its amendments, we hereby certify that we M/s LINUX LAB
TECHNOLOGIES are local supplier meeting the requirement of minimum local content
i.e., 50% as defined in above orders for the material against IPR Enquiry/Floated Tender
Details of location at which local value addition will be made as follows:
Swapnasphurti Business Center Office No. 9&11, 3rd Floor, Nr. Amar Business Zone,
Veerbhadra Nagar, Baner Pune-411045
We also understand, false declarations will be in breach of the code of integrity under
rule 175(1)(i)(h) of the General Financial Rules for which a bidder or its successors can
be debarred for up to two years as per Rule 151(iii) of the General Financial Rules along
with such other actions as may be permissible under law.
For

TECHNOLOGIES.

BIDDER FINANCIAL STANDING
We, M/s Linux Lab Technologies, Baner, Pune, hereby declare that
our company is not under liquidation, not under court receivership,
and not involved in any similar legal proceedings. We also confirm
that our company has not been declared bankrupt or insolvent.
We further state that there are no financial or legal issues that
would affect our ability to carry out the work if the contract is
awarded to us.

NON-REFURBISHED COMPONENTS
&
NON-OBSOLETE PRODUCT
We M/s Linux Lab Technologies, Baner, Pune, hereby solemnly
declare and certify that the product offered / supplied against this
tender is manufactured using only new, unused, and original
components. NO REFURBISHED, repaired, reconditioned, or
previously used components have been used in the manufacturing,
assembly, or supply of the offered product.
We further confirm that the offered product is NOT OBSOLETE, is
currently in production, and is fully supported by the Original
Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) for performance, service, and
spare parts as per applicable standards.
